title: Der Tunnel
writer: Curtis Bernhardt, Bernhard Kellermann, Henry Koster
actors: Paul Hartmann, Attila Hörbiger, Olly von Flint
plot: An engineer is hired to plan and oversee the construction of a undersea tunnel between Europe and the US. However, certain interests don't want to see the tunnel built and use every means at their disposal, including sabotage and ...
